description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Event Details

Date: June 27 (Saturday)

Gathering Time: 10:00 a.m.

Gathering Place: West parking lot of Hanno City Hall

Route: City Hall → Nakai → Mountain path beside Musashi Golf Club → Tourist Information Office (currently closed) → Beside Musashidai Water Distribution Station → Yokotedai → Beside Manfukuji Temple → Azuma Gorge → Hanno River Floodplain → City Hall

Distance: Approximately 13 kilometers

Estimated Time: Approximately 4 hours

Cost: 200 yen (insurance and other fees, collected on the day)

What to Bring: Packed lunch, beverages, rain gear, Sugo-Ashi handbook (if you have one)

Registration: Register with ASA Hanno by Tuesday, June 23. Phone: 042-972-4701 | Fax: 042-974-2190

Cancellation Check: To confirm cancellation due to weather or other reasons, contact ASA Hanno after 9:00 a.m. on the day of the event.

Inquiries: Onda 090-2205-8073

Organized by: Hanno Walking Club

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kenkohukusibu/hokencenter/9290.html
summary: ℹ️ Sugo-Ashi Walking Event – June 27, 2026 (Saturday) – Walk from Musashidai and Yokotedai to Azuma Gorge
